summary: Set 067 Session 2 of 4: OpenAI + Gemini pull-verifier bindings + router-config executor wiring. Added two bindings behind the SAME provider-agnostic pull_route loop driver shipped in S1: OpenAIBinding (uses the Responses API, not chat/completions, because gpt-5.4 returns HTTP 400 for function tools + reasoning_effort on chat/completions -> keeps reasoning items server-side via previous_response_id chaining, store=true, sending only the entries new since the last response each turn; stateful for one run) and GeminiBinding (function_declarations / functionCall <-> functionResponse positional matching with synthesized internal ids; bounded thinkingBudget; thoughtsTokenCount folded into output_tokens for honest cost/budget caps). Extended the ProviderBinding interface with generation_params and applied effort/thinking in AnthropicBinding too. Wired a dedicated pull_verifier executor block into router-config.yaml (per-provider model pins, shared caps with max_output_tokens=24000 for gpt-5.4 reasoning headroom, per-provider generation_params) + resolvers caps_from_config / _resolve_model / _resolve_gen_params (no-block path == exact S1 PullCaps defaults; explicit caps= still wins). 3-PROVIDER HEADLESS CAPABILITY CHECK (small metered live test): all three providers drove the read-only tool loop, issued real probe tool calls (2-3 each), returned schema-valid ISSUES_FOUND verdicts, and all three caught the seeded average()-subtracts-1 defect (~$0.048 total; s2-headless-results.json). Tests: pull_verifier suite 80 -> 86 (OpenAI Responses-API shape + stateful chaining + nudge offset + failure-atomicity; Gemini positional multi-call + thinking-level branch; tool-call parity across all three; executor config resolution + real-config load). NO release (Session 4). Full ai_router pytest suite GREEN. VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 cross-provider, R1 ISSUES_FOUND (3 Minor: OpenAI cursor-not-failure-atomic, OpenAI nudge-offset test gap, Gemini multi-same-name + gemini-3 test gap) -> fixed -> R2 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Minor: cursor still committed before parse) -> fixed (parse-before-commit + defensive non-dict-item skip) -> R3 VERIFIED, no regression. Verify spend ~$0.481. Session 3 = Experiment A capability study.

reason.specifics: Routed rec (gemini-pro): Session 3 is an empirical capability study (pre-register criteria, build a seeded-defect mock-repo + falsifier suite, run the 2x2 arms with K-repeats, analyze into experiment-a-results.md). It needs rigorous experimental-design + statistical-honesty reasoning; the incumbent has full adapter context and the high-effort reasoning the study warrants. Effort bumped to high for the analysis.
